hero.text:
I've spent the whole day talking about Belgium. So has everyone else.

Meanwhile, the two biggest bets on our board tonight are quiet Monday baseball games:

Houston Astros ML +115 — 4 units, 6:46
Milwaukee Brewers ML -108 — 4 units, 7:46

That's how this usually works. The public argues about the main event. The winning money goes where nobody's looking.

Belgium's the show. These are the business.
hero.rtLine: Belgium's the show. These are the business.
hero.selfReplyAt25min: Both lock 15 minutes before first pitch. And yes — the Belgium update is coming before the 7:45 lock, as promised this morning. Board: nhlsavant.com/?ref=t0706m

The main event gets the noise. The board gets the money.
